Title: Verify Configuration Settings
Test Steps:
1. Set MIN_AGE to 18
2. Set MIN_LENGTH_PASSWORD to 8
3. Set API_link to "http://example.com/api"
Expected Result: Configuration settings should be successfully updated.

Title: Verify Notification System Operations
Test Data: Report with id = 1, postDate = "2023-10-01", title = "Test Report", priority = 1, category = "General", address = "123 Main St", creator = "John Doe"
Test Steps:
1. Create a new Report object
2. Call start() method
3. Call downloadReports() method
4. Call elaborateData([Report]) method
5. Call sendNotificationReport(Report) method
6. Call showNotificationWithDefaultSound("Test Report", "Report received", true) method
Expected Result: Notification System should handle the report correctly and send notifications as expected.

Title: Verify API Manager Operations
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve token from LocalUser
2. Request data using token
3. Check if status is OK
4. If status is not OK, request user data
5. Create new LocalUser instance
6. Complete action
Expected Result: API Manager should handle token validation and data requests correctly.

Title: Verify Login Process
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve token from LocalUser
2. Check if token is not null
3. If token is not null, request data using token
4. If token is null or status is not OK, request user data
5. Create new LocalUser instance
6. Complete action
Expected Result: Login process should validate token and request data accordingly.

Title: Verify Reading and Displaying List of Services/Needs/Reports
Test Steps:
1. Send request to API_Manager for JSON list
2. Create new Service/Need/Report for each entry in the JSON list
3. Display list of services/needs/reports
Expected Result: List of services/needs/reports should be displayed correctly.

Title: Verify Insertion Process
Test Steps:
1. Initiate request to API_Manager
2. Convert data to JSON format
3. Send JSON data for processing
4. Receive completion status

Title: Verify Update Process
Test Steps:
1. Print data to screen
2. Retrieve updated data
3. Process each updated data item
4. Convert entry to JSON format
5. Request update entry
6. Receive completion status
